## Checklist

- [ ] `devtools::test()` passes (include test count in the PR description)
- [ ] `devtools::check()` — 0 errors, 0 warnings
- [ ] New or changed user-facing behaviour has a `NEWS.md` entry
- [ ] Documentation updated (`devtools::document()` run if roxygen changed)
- [ ] No `datom:::` usage (cross-package calls via exported `datom::datom_*()` only)
